mapper.select: SELECT id, svc_type, svc_nm, svc_no, cust_id, cntr_no FROM wired_services
SELECT id, svc_type, svc_nm, svc_no, cust_id, cntr_no FROM wired_services WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wired_services (svc_type, svc_nm, svc_no, cust_id, cntr_no) VALUES (#{serviceType}, #{serviceName}, #{serviceNumber}, #{customerId}, #{contractNumber})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM wired_services WHERE id = #{id}
